case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,255.00 U.S et al

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAN FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENT; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES; MEMO OF P & A; DEC AND POS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO THE FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER J. VAN ZANDT; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENT; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS. PETITIONER IS ALSO ORDERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S (UNOPPOSED) MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TEMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM IS GRANTED. THE CLAIM OF CLAIMANT MICHAEL H. SMITH IS STRICKEN IN ITS ENTIRETY FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AS WELL AS DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THIS ACTION IS TERMINATED AS TO CLAIMANT MICHAEL H. SMITH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Teminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's (Unopposed) Motion For Order For Teminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. The claim of claimant Michael H. Smith is stricken in its entirety for failure to comply with the Court's Order Compelling Answers to Form and Special Interrogatories, as well as Demand for Production of Documents. This action is terminated as to claimant Michael H. Smith. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Mtn To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The Motion by Petitioner, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Compel Responses to the First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents; First Set of Form Interrogatories and First Set of Special Interrogatories is GRANTED. Claimant Michael H. Smith is ORDERED to serve complete, verified responses, without objections within 20 days of notice of this order. Failure to serve said responses will subject Claimant Michael H. Smith to terminating sanctions and forfeiture of his claim to the subject $1,255.00 upon further Motion by Petitioner. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To First Set Of Deman For Production And Inspection Of Document; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Document; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. Within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses, without objection, to Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories, Petitioner's First Set of Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, and Petitioner's First Set of Demands for Production and Inspection of Documents. Petitioner is also ordered to produce documents responsive to Petitioner's First Set of Demands for Production and Inspection of Documents within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
